APPEARANCES:
Oren P. Noah of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / moving party Bradley Bishop
Daniel Hoye of YARON & ASSOCIATES (415-658-2929), appearing for defendant / opposing party Certainteed Corporation

(Refer to sign in sheet for other appearances.)

RULING:
PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL, AND EXTENDING DISCOVERY CUTOFF

No objection made and tentative ruling adopted as modified: Plaintiff's motion for preference is granted per C.C.P. 36(d). Trial is August 19, 2013 at 11:15am in Department 503. Last day for hearing summary motions is August 8, 2013. Summary motions shall be brought on regular notice pursuant to the relevant sections of the C.C.P. The time to respond to written discovery is shortened to 20 days. Plaintiff to make a settlement demand on all defendants no later than July 26, 2013. Responses to the demand are due no later than August 2, 2013. Settlement conference in room 603 at 1:30pm on August 8, 2013. Fact discovery cut-off date is August 2, 2013. Expert discovery cut-off date is August 16, 2013. No later than May 14, 2013, plaintiff must provide a statement stating, as to each defendant, the name and contact information of each lay person with knowledge of any facts supporting any of plaintiffs' claims. No later than May 14, 2013, defendants must provide a statement stating the name and contact information of each lay person with knowledge of any facts supporting any of defendant's affirmative defenses. Any person not identified on the statements will be barred from testifying at trial or presenting a declaration on a summary motion absent good cause shown. The parties to meet and confer regarding any other scheduling or other issue which any of them want to have included in the preference order. The pathology material to be delivered to Berry & Berry by May 23. A case management conference is set on May 23, 2013 at 1:30 p.m. to address the pathology issue. Further case management conference on June 25, 2013 at 1:30pm. No need for any party to file any case management conference statement. Parties may appear at the conference by telephone. There will be a mandatory settlement conference with the court pursuant to San Francisco Local Rules of Court Rule 5 on August 19, 2013 at 1:30pm in Department 503. The parties shall comply with Local Rule 5.0 and provide a confidential settlement statement by August 5, 2013 at 2:00pm. Counsel for plaintiff to prepare an order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Miles Lendway of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #13684 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)
